---
title: "deployment.test.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/node/deployment.test.ts"
loc: 56
complexity: 5
logic_score: 7.10
style_score: 3.78
intel_score: 7.83
overall_score: 6.17
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [test](file://node:test)
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [it](file://node:test)
- [mock](file://node:test)
- [beforeEach](file://node:test)
- [afterEach](file://node:test)
- [assert](file://node:assert)
- [*](file://node:fs/promises)
- [deployCandidate](file://../../src/node/deployment.js)

### Exports
- `mockRename`
- `loggedMessages`
- `mockExecFunction`
- `call1`
- `call2`
- `logs`
